title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at FIITJEE - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at FIITJEE - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the FIITJEE family as a Curriculum Developer in Chandigarh. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About FIITJEE:
FIITJEE is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FIITJEE!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
